description: Various accounts. In Judaeo-Arabic. One section may list the expenditures for a funeral, items include the gravediggers (ḥaffārīn) and the perfume for the corpse or embalming fluid (ḥanūṭ). The same text block, further down, mentions a sick woman.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
